narrative:
Precinct Hanover Twp South (precinct in Columbiana County) has 626 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
